title: CloudEvents Metering Envelope
description: CloudEvents 1.0 wrapper for a metering usage-record payload. Wraps the business record for event-bus delivery without changing the record schema. The 'data' field contains the usage-record payload.

id.description: Unique event ID — should match usage-record.recordId for metering events

subject.description: Subject of the event — tenantId or agreementId

dataschema.description: Optional URI of the schema validating 'data'

data.description: The metering payload — must be a valid usage-record or rated-usage document

metering__source__business__usage_dimens.title: Usage Dimension
metering__source__business__usage_dimens.description: A single measurable quantity within a usage record — e.g. bytes transferred, API calls made, CPU seconds consumed. Named and typed for rating rule lookup.

dimensionId.description: Stable identifier for this usage dimension type, e.g. bytes_transferred, api_calls

precision.description: Decimal precision of the quantity measurement

rawValue.description: Original string representation before numeric conversion, for audit

metering__source__references__agreement_.title: Agreement Reference
metering__source__references__agreement_.description: Reference to the ODRL agreement (contract) that governs a usage event. Every usage record must trace to a valid agreement.

negotiationId.description: DSP negotiation process ID that produced this agreement

metering__source__references__counterpar.title: Counterparty Reference
metering__source__references__counterpar.description: Identifies the other party in a dataspace usage event — the provider (for consumer-side metering) or the consumer (for provider-side metering).

counterpartyId.description: BPN, DID, or internal identifier of the counterparty

counterpartyRole.description: Role of the counterparty in this event

connectorId.description: EDC/DSP connector ID of the counterparty

metering__source__business__usage_record.title: Usage Record
metering__source__business__usage_record.description: Immutable record of a single measurable dataspace usage event. Every usage record captures who (tenant, legal entity, counterparty), what (asset, service, API), how much (quantity, unit), when (event time, measurement interval), and under which agreement/policy — sufficient for rating, billing, and compliance audit.

recordId.description: Globally unique, stable record identifier. Must be deterministic per event for idempotent processing.

legalEntityId.description: Legal entity (BPN or internal) that this usage is attributed to

assetId.description: Optional asset identifier (dataset, API, connector, etc.) being consumed

serviceType.description: Service or resource type, e.g. data_transfer, api_call, connector_session

dimensions.description: Measured quantities — at least one dimension required

measurementInterval.description: Time window over which the measurement was taken

eventTime.description: When the usage event occurred (source time, not ingestion time)

reportedAt.description: When this record was written (ingestion time)

sourceSystem.description: System that generated this record, e.g. edc-extension, control-api

traceId.description: OpenTelemetry trace ID for correlation with operational spans

correlationId.description: Business correlation ID (e.g. negotiation ID, transfer process ID)

metadata.description: Optional additional key-value metadata for downstream enrichment
